title: Full Stack Developer
text: We are looking for a Full Stack Developer. Must have experience with Node.js, Express, REST APIs, MongoDB, JWT authentication, React, TypeScript, and testing (Jest). Bonus: React hooks and Redux.

title: Frontend Developer
text: Frontend role focused on React with TypeScript, hooks, API integration (fetch/axios), and testing using Jest or Testing Library.

title: Data Analyst
text: Data Analyst responsible for SQL queries, Python and pandas, statistical analysis, data visualization with Tableau, data cleaning/preprocessing, and basic machine learning using scikit-learn.
